reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game and every aspect and I know the developers are only going to continuously improve on it! I hope more people purchase this and experience the tons of fun that friends and I have playing beer pong and also other side games that the developers have added along. If I could give it more than five stars, I definitely would!

reviews.review_title: Great VR Fun, But Could Use More Depth
reviews.review_description: Bounce Shot is a solid VR arcade game with satisfying physics and fun target-bouncing gameplay. The haptic feedback and level variety keep it engaging, and the leaderboards add replayability. However, I’m giving it 4.5/5 because it lacks deeper content—more multiplayer options or creative challenges would help. Also, occasional tracking hicbreaks immersion. Still, it’s a polished, enjoyable experience that VR fans should try!

reviews.review_title: Virtual Beer Pong - No Mess / Hang Overs
reviews.review_description: I'm late to the party so this is pretty much a single player game at this point. It's still fun to play against AI. It's a very basic game of just beer pongs, but does have a few different tables and even one MR table. Physics feel excellent and since it's made by the same team as Eleven Table Tennis I'm not shocked. If anything, this should just be added to Eleven Table Tennis at this point as maybe a cheap DLC. Cool game to show people that are new to VR to get use to toss a ball and using a controller.

I enjoy the game overall. The ball physics are well done, the look and feel of the game is good. Just give us a lot more customization options...like being able to make the tables longer or wider, an option to extend the timer for the alternative game modes or remove it altogether, an option to have more or fewer cups, change cup colors and make it easier to host a private room (it's not very intuitive whatsoever). It sure beats setting up the game in real life but without the ability to customize it to my own preferences it gets boring rather quickly.

reviews.review_title: Good But Lacks Basic Replay Button
reviews.review_description: In single-player, it would be better if the game remembers your last match setting for each game mode (bounce shot, tug-of-war, domination) and just allow you to set up a repeat match with a straightforward "replay" button instead making you select the match type, no. of bots, and their difficulty each and every time. Other than that it's a solid, low exertion game with good ball physics for the price and a welcome addition to anyone's VR library.

reviews.review_title: Beer Pong in VR with great physics!
reviews.review_description: Fun to be able to play Beer Pong in VR, and the developer made Eleven Table Tennis which has amazing physics! This is a nice app for a bit of fun, and multi-player sounds great too!

This is a pretty basic game of “beer pong” with good physics! I hope more people play this game because I have only got to play vs AI so far, but I could see this being way more fun with real people or a group of friends. The arenas you play in are pretty cool or you can play in mixed reality in your room. Pretty fun game if you’re looking for a time waster or palette cleanser from a big RPG or shooter.

Full disclaimer! I was sent this to test & share my thought's. 
First of all, it is great fun! It does exactly what it promises & delivers the "Beer Pong" experience with good visuals & very good gameplay. Everything just works, you can play in full VR mode or in passthrough which again works brilliantly. 
PVP is great fun & where this games shines in my opinion, especially if you are playing online in mixed reality. 
I would love to see handtracking implemented in the future as this would be amazing to experience without controllers. 
Fully recommend & very happy I was able to play it.

Bounceshot gives what it offers; a fun and well made beer pong experience in vr. 
The game has charming visuals, very minor side-games to play on the side in their various enviroments, all according to your own preference. 
While the game does include bots with their own selectable difficulties, I'd say this game is probably best played with friends, the more the better. This is definitely a hangout game more than anything, perhaps even a way to drink with friends without leaving home. Unfortunately, during the time I played I couldn't catch an online player to go against, but hey, even the bots were pretty fun and challenging.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing and for the feedback! 

Also please keep checking this space, especially as we continue to make updates and add features to the game.

reviews.review_description:
Eleven Table Tennis is a VR title that I consider amongst the most replayable and realistic VR sports simulators/games out there so I was thrilled to see what these developers would do next.  Beer pong was certainly not on my radar but I was still happy to give it a try.  Unlike the aforementioned table tennis game I found this one much harder to get a handle on the physics of throwing the ball.  There are sliders you can adjust but I still had a tough time finding one that felt "just right".  In real life the ball usually tends to go where you throw it (at least early during the game IRL) but here I felt as if it was slightly off direction-wise and I can't put a pin on what exactly felt off.  I wasn't able to play with any real people as the lobbies were empty each time I played, but I did enjoy trying to take down the bots which felt decently challenging and I appreciated having different levels of difficulty for them.  One thing I would appreciate would be the ability to have a quick rematch button as it was felt unnecessary having to hold my hand over the button and then re-add in the bots each time I wanted to challenge them again given the brevity of each match.  There is a cute arcade level to hang out in but none of the machines are interactable which felt a bit disappointing.  Yes this is a beer pong game!!  but having the arcades there made me wish for that extra social element of being able to play the arcades with your friends.  
Overall I believe that if you are a competitive beer pong player you may find a lot to enjoy about this game.  For me I feel like there's a lack of staying power compared to the dev's other game as there's only so many ways you can bounce a ball across the table into a cup.

UPDATE: Looks like there is smooth locomotion in the settings and some of the arcades are interactiable!!   I will keep this review updated as the game grows.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing and for the feedback! 

In the settings menu you have the ability to switch between 'walking' locomotion or teleportation. Also in the Arcade environment there are a few machines that are interactive, just not all. 

Also please keep checking this space, especially as we continue to make updates and add features to the game.

reviews.review_description: have fun playing beer pong against your friends or random players. It is very fun and mechanics feel good to me. I like how you can rearrange the cups during the game.
I think it is a fun game and the graphics looks good too

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing and for the feedback! 

Also please keep checking this space, especially as we continue to make updates and add features to the game.

reviews.review_description: Update game is back and better than ever thanks for getting the issue resolved

reviews.review_title: Lots of fun with just one minor issue
reviews.review_description: This is a really fun game to play and hangout with strangers. I appreciate the bots as well if there’s no one online and they come in various levels to practice! The only thing I don’t like is the jarring sound when you cross a boundary and the ending loud celebration music even when the sound settings are changed. But that’s a me problem and more of a wish rather than an actual “problem.”

Really like this game!! I know it’s just recent game but once there’s more rooms that are open it’ll be much much better. I will say this in an opinion, if you made the game free and add little stuff like cup and pingpong skins. Really think this game will boost off like no other!!

This game is amazing! Would be great if there was a juke box or, a tv to log into your YouTube to play your play lists or something. 

Really great physics! And feed so natural throwing the ball to the cups. I feel the “Legendary” bot could do with being a much harder opponent as currently I personally don’t see the difference between all the bots and they are very easy to beat. 

Overall it’s a pretty impressive game! But then it would be as it’s made by the devs of eleven table tennis 🔥

Absolutely love this game! And I’ll be playing it a lot for sure, seems there is a big hype for a big update! Can’t wait to see what’s coming 😎

Multiplayer is an absolute blast! And can have some great social time with your friends! Also you have a side game air hockey you can play. 

Great job! And can see huge potential

This game is exactly what you think it is. Beer Pong with friends but you can also play solo against a computer opponent and customize their difficulty level. For mutliplaywr, you can have a private room for up to 8 friends with tables for everyone or join random games. 

I think the game is fun and the rules are simple to understand. There are 3 different locations you can play in. Actually throwing in the game is difficult for me though. I'm guessing there is a technique to it that I haven't quite mastered yet so I stick to mostly bounce shots. 

 The arcade room has arcade games all around but they can't be played but it would be cool if you could. There is an air hockey table that you can mess with but it isn't set up to score an actual game. Hope to see these ibecome playable in a future update. 

For the price, it's worth checking out.
Let's just say I won't miss the next tournament

FUN FUN FUN !!!❤️🥰🍺 first VR experience!!! 
-AR asking for your support!! Please

This game is simple, doesnt need much space but needs improving. I love the concept but i think there should be other gamemodes like ping pong or things like that also there are a few bugs for example i played a game against ai and I won when i lost. 
On the other hand this game is a simple and easy game. I think its lovely and all that is put in it is great there are just some bugs here and there but o know that the team will be on everything in no time. 
The ui when you start is a little complicated and can defenitly use a step by step tutorial but if you try you get the hang of it eventualy.
Great game, i recomend if you like pong pong balls and throwing them in cups.
